_comment: Curated documentation site seeds for the site-crawl scanner. Hand-edited. The scanner discovers pages from these sites via sitemap.xml (or nav-link crawling), Haiku-screens for relevance, and files issues for relevant pages. Per-seed crawl state lives in registry/site-crawl-state.json.

_schema.id: stable short identifier (used as key in state file)
_schema.url: seed page URL — scanner starts here and discovers linked pages
_schema.scope: one-line hint for the Haiku screener about what's relevant vs. noise
_schema.source_type: one of: blog-post, documentation, discussion, paper (matches source-submission.yml dropdown)

seeds.scope: agent patterns, workflows, MCP tools, orchestration, observability — skip API reference pages, changelog entries, and release notes
